SEARCH

Uses of Package
gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology

Packages that use gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology
Package
Description
gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology
 
gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils
This package contains utility classes for performing V2 to FHIR Conversions.
  • Classes in gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology used by gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology
    Class
    Description
    CodeValidator
    Validates coded concepts against value sets.
    ConceptTranslator
    Translates coded concepts between code systems using concept maps or named mapping tables.
    DemographicsMapper
    Maps demographic codes (race and ethnicity) to US Core FHIR extensions.
    DisplayNameResolver
    Resolves and manages preferred display names for coded concepts.
    GeoMapper
    Resolves and normalizes geographic codes, primarily ISO 3166 country codes.
    Mapping
    This utility class supports mapping between coded values and system names in V2 and FHIR
    NamingSystemResolver
    Resolves OIDs to canonical URIs and vice-versa, and provides URI lookups for HL7 V2 tables.
    TerminologyLoader
    Loads and retrieves FHIR terminology resources (NamingSystem, ConceptMap, CodeSystem, ValueSet).
    TerminologyMapper
    Composite terminology service interface extending all eight focused sub-interfaces.
    TranslationResult
    Immutable value object carrying the result of a concept translation.
    UnitMapper
    Maps source unit codes (e.g., V2 unit strings) to UCUM Coding values.
  • Classes in gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology used by gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils
    Class
    Description
    Mapping
    This utility class supports mapping between coded values and system names in V2 and FHIR
